# Technology Stack & Infrastructure

## 1. Core Stack
- **Backend Language/Framework:** [Örn: PHP 8.3 / Laravel 11]
- **Frontend Stack:** [Örn: Livewire 3 / TailwindCSS / Alpine.js]
- **Database:** [Örn: MySQL 8.0]
- **Cache/Queue:** [Örn: Redis]

## 2. Infrastructure & DevOps
- **Containerization:** [Docker / Sail]
- **Hosting/Server:** [Örn: AWS / DigitalOcean / VPS]
- **CI/CD:** [Github Actions?]

## 3. 3rd Party Integrations
- **Payment Gateway:** [Iyzico, Stripe vb.]
- **Mailing:** [Resend, Mailgun]
- **Storage:** [S3, MinIO, Local]

## 4. Paket/Kütüphane Tercihleri
- Admin Panel: [FilamentPHP vb.]
- Auth: [Breeze / Jetstream]
